mnemonics.title: Mnemonic 1
mnemonics.content: Expected Value is a Weighted Average: Think 'E' for Every outcome times its chance, Added together.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 1
mnemonics.content: Expectation is the long-run average value of a random variable.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 2
mnemonics.content: Linearity of Expectation: E[aX + bY] = aE[X] + bE[Y] holds even if X and Y are NOT independent.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 3
mnemonics.content: The Law of the Unconscious Statistician (LOTUS) allows you to find the expectation of a function of a random variable, g(X), without finding its new distribution.
